task_completion.description: Verify the $1,500 payment to City Services was reclassified to Professional Services.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Payments screen or an Edit Payment screen in Manager.io showing a $1,500.00 payment to 'City Services' with the account set to 'Professional Services' instead of 'Office Supplies'.

task_completion.description: Verify a new $35 payment was recorded for the bank service charge.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a payment record in Manager.io for $35.00 to 'First National Bank' dated 2025-02-28, categorized to the 'Bank charges' account with the description 'Monthly service fee'.

task_completion.description: Verify the adjusting journal entry was created with the correct lines and amounts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Journal Entry dated 2025-03-31 with narration 'Q1 2025 adjusting entries'. It must have four lines: Depreciation Expense (Debit $450), Accumulated Depreciation (Credit $450), Insurance Expense (Debit $600), and Prepaid Insurance (Credit $600).

task_completion.description: Verify the credit limit for the customer with the largest outstanding balance (Alfreds Futterkiste) was set to $1,000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Customers tab or Edit Customer screen for 'Alfreds Futterkiste' showing a Credit Limit of $1,000.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the Lock Date was set to 2025-03-31.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Settings -> Lock Date screen in Manager.io showing the lock date explicitly set to '2025-03-31'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct Net Profit figure was written to the specified text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal or text editor showing the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/q1_pnl.txt'. The file should contain the exact net profit figure of '5115' or '$5,115.00'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Manager.io web interface to make the accounting changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing navigation through the Manager.io web application (e.g., clicking on Payments, Journal Entries, Settings) rather than executing direct SQLite database modifications in the terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent generated and viewed the required reports to find the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots of the 'Aged Receivables' report and the 'Profit & Loss Statement' being viewed in the Manager.io interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually created or wrote to the output text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands (like 'echo', 'nano', or 'cat') or a GUI text editor being used to write the final net profit to '/home/ga/Documents/q1_pnl.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct Net Profit after all adjustments is exactly $5,115.00. The customer with the largest outstanding balance is 'Alfreds Futterkiste' ($5,000 total). The miscoded payment is $1,500 to 'City Services' (must be moved to 'Professional Services'). The missing bank charge is $35 to 'First National Bank' (account 'Bank charges'). The adjusting journal entry must be exactly $450 for Depreciation and $600 for Insurance. The Lock Date must be 2025-03-31.
